## Per-Skill Detail

### /awareness-ledger
- **Description:** Institutional memory for your project. Commands: record, consult, review. Usage: /awareness-ledger [command] [args]
- **When to use:** Recording or consulting incidents, decisions, patterns, and flows that should persist across sessions.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `record` — Create a new record (INC, DEC, PAT, FLW)
  - `consult` — Query the ledger with agent-assisted analysis
  - `review` — Health check: stale entries, statistics, tag drift
- **Lane:** coding (table)
- **Triggers:** ledger, institutional memory, incidents, decisions, patterns, record, consult
- **Path:** .claude/skills/awareness-ledger/SKILL.md

### /code-evaluator
- **Description:** Evaluate code to prevent common AI coding mistakes — dead code, duplication, complexity hotspots, reinvented helpers, leftover scaffolding. Two functions plus a pre-write advisor. Commands: review (post-write), sweep (full codebase).
- **When to use:** After writing or editing code, or to clean up a codebase, find unused/dead code, find duplicates, or check complexity.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `review` — Post-write evaluation of a diff/path; auto-fixes only HIGH-confidence, guard-cleared dead code
  - `sweep` — Whole-tree dead-code / duplication / complexity report (report-only)
- **Lane:** coding (frontmatter)
- **Triggers:** code review, dead code, duplication, complexity, unused code, cleanup
- **Path:** .claude/skills/code-evaluator/SKILL.md

### /route
- **Description:** Skill router. Pass a task description; route consults the index and dispatches to the right skill+function via the Skill tool.
- **When to use:** Any follow-up the current workflow does not explicitly name.
- **Lane:** UNCONFIRMED
- **Triggers:** route, dispatch, which skill
- **Path:** .claude/skills/route/SKILL.md

### /seashells-theme
- **Description:** SeaShells theme palettes, format patterns, consistency rules, and update diagnostics. Modes: default (reference), update (migration diagnostic), list (show modes)
- **When to use:** Editing SeaShells theme files, loading color palettes/format patterns, or running the Omarchy migration diagnostic.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `default` — Load color palettes, format patterns, and consistency rules
  - `update` — Run the Omarchy migration diagnostic (classify files, check keys, detect drift)
  - `list` — Display the Modes table
- **Lane:** creative (table) — per-function: `default → creative`, `update → coding (table)`, `list → creative`
- **Triggers:** seashells, theme, palette, color, omarchy, update diagnostic
- **Path:** .claude/skills/seashells-theme/SKILL.md

### /self-heal
- **Description:** Ambient friction detection and surgical skill correction. Embeds into all skills. Triggers at task resolution when skill instructions caused friction.
- **When to use:** Embedded observer; surfaces automatically at task resolution when skill instructions caused friction. `review` lists observer coverage.
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `review` — List skills with the observer embedded; show friction/patch counts; offer to embed where missing
- **Lane:** coding (table)
- **Triggers:** self-heal, friction, skill correction, patch, observer
- **Path:** .claude/skills/self-heal/SKILL.md

### /skill-builder
- **Description:** Create, audit, optimize Claude Code skills. Commands: skills, list, new, strip, optimize, agents, hooks, verify, inline, ledger, cascade, checksums, convert, shell-safety, route.
- **When to use:** Creating, auditing, or optimizing Claude Code skills, or working with SKILL.md files, hooks, or agents. (Direct `/skill-builder` invocation is the always-legal maintenance hatch; route never synthesizes the `dev` prefix.)
- **Modes / commands:**
  - `audit`, `optimize`, `agents`, `hooks`, `new`, `inline`, `skills`, `list`, `verify`, `ledger`, `cascade`, `reconcile`, `checksums`, `convert`, `shell-safety`, `route`, `code-eval`, `model-map`, `strip`
- **Lane:** UNCONFIRMED
- **Triggers:** skill, audit, optimize, agents, hooks, create skill
- **Path:** .claude/skills/skill-builder/SKILL.md

### /text-eval
- **Description:** Evaluate prose for AI-generated-text signatures and overbuilt writing, protecting the author's voice. Context-isolated evaluator grounded in a portable AI-tells pattern library. Report-only by default.
- **When to use:** Checking whether text reads as machine-written, finding AI tells, or reviewing drafts for authenticity.
- **Lane:** creative (frontmatter)
- **Triggers:** text evaluation, ai tells, authenticity, prose review, machine-written
- **Path:** .claude/skills/text-eval/SKILL.md
